title: TURA-060 Atami long-established hot spring inn Beautiful landlady of a hot spring inn who are exploited by members of an anti-social organization and show sincerity with their bodies "I can't hold a meeting of the organization, so what should I do? Show your sincerity!"
overview: A meeting of the organization was supposed to be held because the reservation was not made due to the ryokan's clumsiness, but it was canceled! The team members who had lost their face threatened the beautiful proprietress by saying, "I'm sorry for this," and were doing obscene acts as if to make them pay their sincerity with their bodies!
